About Vanguard Transport

Building Trust, One Load at a Time

Founded in 2003, Vanguard Transport Inc. is a Brampton-based, family-operated dry van carrier with over two decades of reliable freight service across Canada and the United States.

🏆
Fully Owned & Debt-Free Fleet
Our 10 company trucks and 19 trailers are fully paid off — meaning lower overhead and more competitive rates for our clients.
🛡️
C-TPAT & FAST Certified
Fully compliant for cross-border freight with CVOR, US DOT, MC number, and customs security program certifications.
📍
Strategically Located in Brampton
At the heart of Canada's freight corridor — minutes from Highway 410, 427, and 401, with direct access to US border crossings.
Contact Us Today →
What We Do

Our Services

We specialize in one thing and we do it better than anyone — dry van freight across Canada and the United States.

Core Service
📦

Dry Van Transport

Our 53' Stoughton dry van trailers protect your freight from the elements. From palletized goods to boxed products — if it ships dry, we move it.

🇨🇦🇺🇸

Cross-Border Canada–USA

Licensed, bonded, and experienced in cross-border moves. We handle customs paperwork and compliance so you don't have to. Seamless freight, every time.

🗺️

Long Haul & Dedicated Lanes

Ontario to Quebec, Alberta, the Maritimes, and throughout the US Midwest. We run the lanes consistently — which means predictable transit times for you.

Freightliner Cascadia Fleet

Late-model, well-maintained, ELD-equipped trucks running every day.

Why Choose Vanguard

What Makes Us Different

We're not a broker. We're not a startup. We're a 20-year-old, asset-based carrier with proven reliability and skin in every load we haul.

🚛

Asset-Based Carrier

We own the trucks, trailers, and the accountability. No middlemen, no surprises.

⏱️

On-Time Delivery

20+ years of keeping our word on transit times, appointments, and communication.

📡

Real-Time Tracking

ELD-equipped fleet with GPS tracking. You always know where your freight is.

🤝

Direct Relationships

You deal with the owner's team — not a call center. Real people, real answers.

💰

Competitive Rates

Debt-free fleet means low overhead. Savings we pass directly to our clients.

🛡️

Fully Insured & Compliant

CVOR, US DOT, MC number, C-TPAT, FAST — clean record, fully certified.

Coverage Area

Canada & USA — We Go There

From our base in Brampton, Ontario, we run freight across the country and into the United States. No lane too long, no load too routine.

🔵
Ontario → Quebec / Montreal
Canada's highest volume corridor — we run it daily
🔵
Ontario → Alberta / Western Canada
Long haul, premium rates, consistent return freight
🔵
Ontario → Maritime Provinces
East coast freight handled with care
🇺🇸
Canada → USA (Cross-Border)
Michigan, Ohio, Illinois, New York & beyond — we cross daily
🔵
GTA Regional & Dedicated Lanes
Local cartage, drop-and-hook, dedicated shipper programs
Certifications & Compliance

Trusted & Certified

Every certification required to move freight across North America — no delays, no issues at the border.

🇨🇦
CVOR Certified
Ontario Commercial Vehicle Operator — clean record
🇺🇸
US DOT / MC
Licensed to operate throughout the United States
🛡️
C-TPAT
Customs-Trade Partnership Against Terrorism
⚡
FAST Program
Free & Secure Trade — priority border processing
Our Equipment

A Fleet Built to Perform

10 company trucks. 19 dry van trailers. All owned outright. All maintained to the highest standard.

The Vanguard Fleet

Late-model Freightliner Cascadia trucks paired with 53' Stoughton dry van trailers — the combination built for Canadian winters and cross-border efficiency.

🚛 10 Company Trucks 📦 19 Dry Van Trailers 📡 ELD Equipped ❄️ Winter Ready

Who We Serve

Industries We Move

From food & beverage to manufacturing — if it ships on a dry van, we've done it.

🍎

Food & Beverage

Non-perishable food products, packaged goods, and beverages across North America.

🏭

Manufacturing

Raw materials and finished goods from factory floors to distribution centers.

🚗

Automotive Parts

Tier 2 & 3 auto parts moving between Ontario, Michigan, and Ohio assembly plants.

📦

Retail & CPG

Consumer packaged goods destined for major retailers, DCs, and fulfillment centers.

🧴

Health & Beauty

Personal care and pharmaceutical supply chain shipments across borders.

🏗️

Building Materials

Construction supplies, flooring, fixtures, and hardware to sites across Canada & the US.

🖨️

Paper & Packaging

Rolls, sheets, and finished packaging from mills and converters to end users.

⚙️

Industrial Goods

Equipment, parts, and industrial supplies for businesses throughout North America.
